title: Modern Typing, Generics, and API Evolution · Runtime Lens: Oop Variance
summary: Type-check interchangeable repositories, policies, events, and domain collections in Python 3.14. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop variance increment in a statically checked domain API. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about covariance, contravariance, invariance, mutation, and substitutability in generic APIs.
Define generic classes and functions whose type parameters express a real input-output relationship.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
